objective: Produce an explicit Sidon subset of {0,1}^24 with more than 7,192 points.

tracked_unaccepted_seed.verification: Released Vela 0.901.0 reproduced 7,192 points and 25,866,028 distinct unordered pair sums on 2026-07-18.
tracked_unaccepted_seed.encoding: Comma-separated six-digit lowercase hexadecimal 24-bit vectors; the first source coordinate is the most-significant bit.

format.points: <claimed_size distinct arrays of exactly 24 binary integers>

output_contract.exact_claim: There exists a Sidon subset of {0,1}^24 with at least 7,193 elements.

verification.dimensions: Every point is one 24-bit binary vector.
verification.cardinality: claimed_size equals the number of distinct points and is greater than 7,192.
verification.sidon: All claimed_size*(claimed_size+1)/2 componentwise integer sums for pairs i<=j are distinct.
verification.novelty: The candidate cardinality exceeds the tracked 7,192-point seed, so a verifier pass is non-duplicate lower-bound evidence.

negative_contract.scope: A failed or bounded search is retained only as non-authoritative Canopus run evidence and does not establish that 7,192 is maximal.

authority.verifier_success: mechanical evidence under the frozen result contract
authority.permit_requires: A previously human-signed Vela policy matching the exact packet, profile, capsule, result-contract, replayability, and Engine context roots.
